channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Texas Senate Runoff Tests Trump's Influence
item.description: Trump endorsed Attorney General Ken Paxton over incumbent Sen. John Cornyn in the Texas Senate race.

item.title: Trump to undergo annual physical; disclosure of results remains his choice
Best and worst places to keep a $40,000 emergency fund right now
item.description: If you have $40,000 saved for emergencies, consider these two options and avoid these two others.

item.title: Trump administration proposes NDAs for all federal employees to curb leaks
item.description: The Trump administration plans to curb press leaks by requiring all federal employees to sign nondisclosure agreements.
